purpose: Repair publish-gate metadata for one Gaokao v5 draft article so the standard controlled article publish dry-run can evaluate the draft without bypassing publish preflight.

inputs.package: Required repaired Gaokao v5 SEO content package directory.
inputs.confirm-package-sha256: Required SHA-256 of the package directory.
inputs.reviewed-by: Required for execute; admin user id recorded as editorial reviewer.
inputs.execute: Optional. Without this flag, the command writes evidence only.
inputs.confirm-repair: Required exact confirmation phrase when --execute is used.

writes_when_execute.article_translation_revisions: Marks the locked working revision as approved and records reviewed_by, reviewed_at, and approved_at.
writes_when_execute.article_editorial_package_imports: Updates the latest import gate row with complete references, graph, and answer surface metadata.
writes_when_execute.article_seo_meta: Adds editorial_package_v1 CTA slots and visible FAQ metadata while preserving schema/hreflang/search holds.
writes_when_execute.article_tags: Creates missing reader-facing tags from package tag suggestions.
writes_when_execute.article_tag_map: Attaches package tags to the locked article.

dry_run.evidence: contains path, size, sha256, authority snapshot, planned metadata repair counts, required confirmation phrase

execute.article_remains: draft, non-public, non-indexable, no sitemap, no llms, no published_revision_id
